tasks.subject: Task 1: Add modalSlotRecipe in components/modal/recipe.ts
tasks.description: Created src/components/modal/recipe.ts with teleport-modal className + dialogAnatomy slots + Teleport visuals. Verified via pnpm generate-theme && pnpm type-check.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Register modal recipe in src/theme/slotRecipes.ts
tasks.description: Registered modalSlotRecipe under the Chakra 'dialog' key (matches dialogAnatomy). Verified via pnpm generate-theme && pnpm type-check.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Implement Modal wrapper component
tasks.description: Wrapper around Chakra Dialog with compositional + trigger= convenience modes. Synthesizes onClose(event, reason) via Ark onEscapeKeyDown/onInteractOutside. All disable* flags + hideBackdrop + keepInDOMAfterClose + static sub-components.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Re-export modal from components/index.ts
tasks.description: modal exported alphabetically between layout and popover.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Write Modal Storybook stories
tasks.description: CSF3 stories: Default, Convenience, HideBackdrop, KeepInDOMAfterClose, DisableClose, CloseReason. Sizes/Placements/MotionPreset stories were removed after the first draft — the recipe has no variants for those knobs (Teleport Dialog never exposed them).

tasks.subject: Task 6: Add Modal.mdx Docs page and regenerate props
tasks.description: Modal.mdx created mirroring Popover.mdx; generated.json regenerated with Modal entry. All tests green (75/75).
